content: I'll help implement OAuth 2.0 authentication. Let me start by analyzing the auth module. [ACTION:Read src/auth.ts] After reviewing the code, I found that we need to add OAuth providers. [ACTION:Write src/oauth.ts] I've created the OAuth provider configuration.
Great! Let me add Google OAuth provider. [ACTION:Edit src/oauth.ts] I've added Google provider with client ID and secret configuration. Please review the changes.
I'll run the tests now. [ACTION:Bash npm test] The tests pass successfully. OAuth login is working correctly.
Can you help me debug the payment module? Tests are failing.

I'll analyze the payment tests. Let me read the test files first. [ACTION:Read tests/payment.test.ts] [ACTION:Bash npm test] Found the issue - missing mock for Stripe API. I'll fix it now. [ACTION:Edit tests/payment.test.ts] Fixed. Tests now pass.

I'll add comprehensive error handling. [ACTION:Read src/payment.ts] After analyzing the code, I need to add try-catch blocks. [ACTION:Edit src/payment.ts] I've added error handling for network failures and invalid responses.
Here are the application logs. [ACTION:Bash tail -n 50 logs/app.log] The logs show successful OAuth authentication and payment processing.
